content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

Statement: All pencils are tools. Some tools are sharp.

Conclusion I: Some pencils are sharp.

Conclusion II: All tools are pencils.

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

Neither Conclusion I nor Conclusion II follows.Explanation:

Some tools are sharp, but it’s unclear if pencils are among them, so Conclusion I doesn’t follow. Not all tools are pencils, so Conclusion II is Does not follows.Also Check:➣ Test your knowledge- Quiz!
